creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #11)
Also, the software doesn't seem to actually accurately report any info from memcached. When I test it, all I get are zeros. Even turning up the verbosity, all I get is:

DEBUG [20180521-13:10:01.905] [report/curses.cpp:69][render] cursesReport: Rendering report with 0 data point

and similar over and over.
